Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Further Responses To: Form Interrogatories, Set One To Defendant Pusan Yeung; Form Interrogatories, Set One To Defendant Omer Khawar; Form Interrogatories, Set One To Defendant Stewart Hsu; Special; Points And Authorities; Separate Statement And Declarations In Support
Off Calendar Nov-14-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearance:
Cathy Mosbrucker, Esq., appeared for plaintiff & moving party: Roger Roldan
L. Leianne Choy, Esq., appeared (via telephone) for Defendant & opposing party: Nimesh R. Shah
Ruling:
Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiff Roger Roldan's Motion To Compel Further Responses To Form Interrogatories, Set One, To Defendant Pusan Yeung; Form Interrogatories, Set One, To Defendant Omer Khawar; Form Interrogatories To Defendant Stewart Hsu; Special Interrogatories, Set One, To Defendant Pusan Yeung; Special Interrogatories, Set One, To Defendant Omer Khawar; Special Interrogatories, Set One, To Defendant Steward Hsu; Demand For Identification And Production Of Documents, Set One, To Defendant Pusan Yeung; Demand For Identification And Production Of Documents, Set One, To Defendant Omer Khawar; Demand For Identification And Production Of Documents, Set One, To Defendant Steward Hsu, is moot in part, granted in part, and denied in part. The matters which remain in dispute are Form Interrogatory Number 15.1, Special Interrogatory Number 5, and Request for Production Of Documents Number 7.
The motion is granted as to Form Interrogatory Number 15.1 and Special Interrogatory Number 5. The objections are overruled and ordered stricken. The responses are incomplete.
The motion is granted as to Request For Production Of Documents Number 7 limited to type of property sought, plans for the property, and agreements among the purchasers, not limited in time.
Further responses shall be made within 15 days of notice of this order.
All requests for sanctions are denied. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-21-2007 Set For Trial On Jan-14-08 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Dec-28-07 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 505

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-21-2007 Off Calendar

(Amended) Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Pltf'S Further Responses To Form Interrogatories And Request For Sanctions Against Pltf And Pltf'S Attorney
Off Calendar Jun-28-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearance:
L. Leianne Choy, esq., appaeing for Defendant & moving party: Nimesh Shah, et al
Katrina C. Decker, Esq., appearing for Defendant Shah
Mary Jane Foran, Esq., appearing for plaintiff & opposing party:Roger Roldan

Ruling:
Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted: Defendants' Motion To Compel Further Responses To Form Interrogatories is granted in part and denied in part. The motion is granted as to Form Interrogatory Numbers 13.1 and 13.2. The objections are overruled.
The motion is granted as to Interrogatory Numbers 70.1-70.10. The objections are overruled.
The motion is denied as to Interrogatory No. 70.11 as vague and overly broad.
Further responses shall be made within 15 days of notice of this order.
Defendant's request for sanctions is denied. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
